metric_summaries_ui.spend_to_income_ratio: Well-managed spending leaves healthy room for savings and financial goals each month, a strong position to maintain consistently.
metric_summaries_ui.saving_consistency: Your strong savings regularity provides a solid foundation for achieving financial milestones, despite a few months with travel or health spikes.
metric_summaries_ui.emergency_corpus: The current emergency cushion is significantly below target, leaving you vulnerable to unexpected expenses without adequate protection.
metric_summaries_ui.emi_burden: An elevated loan repayment load can strain your monthly budget, potentially limiting funds for savings and other financial goals.
metric_summaries_ui.credit_score: An excellent credit score like yours opens doors to better loan terms and lower interest rates, saving you money on future borrowings.
metric_summaries_ui.life_insurance: Well done – your life cover meets the recommended level, providing solid financial protection for your dependents.
metric_summaries_ui.health_insurance: Your health cover meets the recommended level, offering good financial security against potential medical costs.
metric_summaries_ui.tax_filing_status: Maintaining current tax filing ensures compliance and avoids potential penalties, forming the essential base for any further tax planning.
metric_summaries_ui.tax_savings: Your current tax optimization suggests you might be missing opportunities to reduce your taxable income and enhance your overall savings potential.
metric_summaries_ui.investment_rate: Increasing your investment rate is crucial for long-term wealth creation, helping you reach financial goals faster and build substantial assets.
metric_summaries_ui.portfolio_diversification: A well-diversified portfolio helps spread risk across different asset classes, protecting your wealth from market volatility and enhancing stability.
metric_summaries_ui.portfolio_overlap: Understanding fund overlap is vital to avoid unnecessary concentration risk and ensure your investments are truly diversified for optimal returns.

spend_to_income_ratio.text: Keep tracking your expenses to maintain this healthy ratio.

saving_consistency.text: Set up auto-debit to ensure consistent savings every month.

emergency_corpus.text: Build your emergency fund to cover at least 6 months of expenses.

emi_burden.text: Explore options to reduce your loan repayment burden.

credit_score.text: Maintain your strong credit profile for future financial flexibility.

life_insurance.text: Review your existing life cover to ensure it aligns with future needs.

health_insurance.text: Explore options to enhance your health cover for comprehensive protection.

tax_filing_status.text: Review your tax returns for accuracy and potential deductions.

tax_savings.text: Explore ELSS and PPF to boost your tax-saving investments.

investment_rate.text: Increase your monthly investment to accelerate wealth growth.

portfolio_diversification.text: Review your asset allocation to optimize for your goals.

portfolio_overlap.text: Check for fund overlap to ensure true portfolio diversification.

overall_summary.overview: Your credit profile is exceptionally strong at 770, providing a solid financial base. However, building your emergency cushion and managing loan repayments are key priorities.
whats_going_well: Your credit profile is exceptionally strong, opening doors to favorable loan terms and future financial flexibility.
Your life and health covers adequately protect your household and medical needs, providing solid security.
Your spending is well-managed at 65% of income, allowing room for financial goals.
Your investment portfolio is well-diversified across various asset classes, managing risk effectively.
whats_needs_attention: Your emergency cushion is low at 1.7 months, leaving your household vulnerable to unexpected expenses.
Your loan repayment load is elevated at 31% of income, limiting funds for other financial goals.
There is meaningful headroom to enhance your tax efficiency and utilize available savings avenues.
Your investment commitment is in the early-stage category, needing an increase for faster wealth growth.
